cases.prompt: Apply the requested PR review changes and make the branch ready for another review pass.
cases.expected_behavior: Implements reviewer feedback directly in the branch.

cases.prompt: Fix the comments from the PR review one by one and keep the changes minimal.
cases.expected_behavior: Addresses review comments with targeted edits.

cases.prompt: Review the PR comments and summarize them.
cases.expected_behavior: This is a review-summary request, not a fix-up request.

cases.prompt: The reviewer flagged a bug in the edge case handling; patch it without widening scope.
cases.expected_behavior: Makes the requested fix while avoiding unrelated changes.
